characters.appearance: Young male, early 20s, slim build, light brown complexion. Short black hair, slight mustache and goatee.
characters.wardrobe: Wears a blue and white tie-dye t-shirt and grey jeans in the first half, then switches to a dark grey t-shirt and grey jeans.

characters.appearance: Middle-aged female, 40s-50s, medium build, light brown complexion. Black hair tied back, wears a bindi and occasionally glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Wears a blue patterned kurta initially, then a patterned top, and finally a solid orange kurta with white detailing.
characters.demeanor: Expressive, transitions from frustrated and confused to confident and animated.

characters.appearance: Young female, slim build, fair complexion. Long, straight dark hair.
characters.demeanor: Professional, friendly, and static, typical of AI avatars.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: अरे बेटा, आज तेरे चाचा की एनिवर्सरी है। सब ग्रुप में इंग्लिश में मैसेज कर रहे हैं, हम भी करें क्या? [Hey son, today is your uncle's anniversary. Everyone is messaging in English in the group, should we do it too?]
Character A says: कर दो ना मम्मी, मुझे क्यों बता रही हो? [Do it then mom, why are you telling me?]
Character B says: अरे, तू टाइप करने में हेल्प कर देगा ना, इसलिए पूछ रही हूँ। [I'm asking so you could help me type.]
Character A says: तो सीधा-सीधा बोलो ना। [Then say it directly.]
Character B says: बेटा, इसको इंग्लिश में क्या बोलते हैं, मुझे याद नहीं आ रहा। [Son, what is this called in English, I can't remember.]
Character B says: अरे आ गया तू? ज़रा ऑनलाइन सब्ज़ियां तो ऑर्डर कर दे, मुझे समझ नहीं आ रहा इंग्लिश में क्या टाइप करूँ। [Hey, you're here? Just order vegetables online, I don't understand what to type in English.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core problem: the mother's daily struggle and reliance on her son for basic English tasks.
- Creates a relatable, slightly frustrating dynamic between mother and son.
- Hooks the audience by showing real-world scenarios where lack of English causes friction.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: बेटा, मैंने तुझे व्हाट्सएप पर एक मैसेज भेजा है, ज़रा पढ़कर बताना इसका मतलब क्या है? [Son, I sent you a message on WhatsApp, just read it and tell me what it means?]
Character B says: अरे बेटा, ये जो फॉर्म है ये पूरा इंग्लिश में है, मुझे कुछ समझ नहीं आ रहा। [Hey son, this form is completely in English, I don't understand anything.]
Character A says: मैं अभी बाइक पर हूँ मम्मी, पाँच मिनट रुको। [I am on the bike right now mommy, wait five minutes.]
Character B says: उफ़, ऐसे तो काम नहीं चलेगा। मुझे खुद ही इंग्लिश बोलना सीखना पड़ेगा। [Ugh, this won't work. I have to learn to speak English myself.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Escalates the problem through a fast-paced montage of different situations.
- Shows the son is too busy to always help, pushing the mother to a breaking point.
- Ends with a strong emotional resolution: the mother decides to take control and learn English herself.

- Acts as a bridge between the problem and the solution.
- Indicates that some time has passed for the mother to learn and improve.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: कुछ दिनों बाद... [A few days later...]

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: हैं? मम्मी आजकल इंग्लिश में स्टेटस बड़े अच्छे डाल रही है। पहले तो हमेशा मुझसे पूछती थी। [Huh? Mommy is putting up English statuses quite well nowadays. Earlier she always used to ask me.]
Character A says: मम्मी, आजकल बिना मेरी हेल्प के स्टेटस डाल रही हो, सब खुद ही मैनेज कर रही हो, बात क्या है? [Mommy, nowadays you're putting up statuses without my help, managing everything yourself, what's the matter?]
Character B says: तो क्या बार-बार दूसरों से पूछना? मुझे लगा कि अब मुझे खुद कॉन्फिडेंस के साथ इंग्लिश बोलना सीखना चाहिए, तो मैंने सीख लिया। [Then why keep asking others again and again? I felt that I should learn to speak English with confidence myself now, so I learned.]
Character A says: कैसे? [How?]
Character B says: Supernova ऐप है ना, उसके AI ट्यूटर ने मुझे सब सिखा दिया। [Supernova app is there right, its AI tutor taught me everything.]
Character A says: Supernova क्या है? और AI ट्यूटर? [What is Supernova? And AI tutor?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Reveals the payoff: the mother is now confident and independent.
- Reverses the dynamic, with the son now surprised and curious about her new skills.
- Naturally introduces the brand name (Supernova) as the solution.

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: Supernova एक कमाल का इंग्लिश लर्निंग ऐप है। इसमें हम हिंदी से इंग्लिश बोलना सीख सकते हैं। अगर तुझे अपने इंटरव्यू की तैयारी करनी है ना, तो ये ऐप बेस्ट है। ये हमें रोज़मर्रा की सिचुएशन जैसे दुकान पर, या दोस्तों से बात करना सिखाता है। और इसमें एक AI ट्यूटर है जिसके साथ हम बिना किसी झिझक के इंग्लिश बोलने की प्रैक्टिस कर सकते हैं। [Supernova is an amazing English learning app. In this, we can learn to speak English from Hindi. If you want to prepare for your interview, this app is the best. It teaches us everyday situations like talking at a shop, or with friends. And it has an AI tutor with whom we can practice speaking English without any hesitation.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Directly pitches the app's core value propositions in a conversational way.
- Highlights Supernova's specific features: Hindi-to-English learning, real-world situations, and the AI tutor.
- Positions the app as useful for both the mother's daily needs and the son's career (interview prep).
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova: SPEAK WITH CONFIDENCE
LEARN ENGLISH FROM HINDI
DAILY PRACTICE WITH AI TUTOR
REAL-WORLD CONVERSATIONS

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: वाह, तुमने तो सच में बहुत बढ़िया सीख लिया। [Wow, you really learned very well.]
Character B says: हाँ बिल्कुल! और पता है, इसमें रोज़ के छोटे-छोटे लेसन्स होते हैं। बस दिन के 15-20 मिनट प्रैक्टिस करो, और इंग्लिश बोलना एकदम आसान हो जाता है। और हाँ, ये बहुत अफोर्डेबल भी है! [Yes absolutely! And you know, it has short daily lessons. Just practice for 15-20 minutes a day, and speaking English becomes very easy. And yes, it's very affordable too!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Reinforces the ease of use and low time commitment (15-20 minutes a day).
- Mentions affordability without giving specific pricing, aligning with Supernova's guidelines.
- Maintains the warm, encouraging tone of the mother sharing a great discovery.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: तो अब बिना किसी महंगी क्लास के, आप भी घर बैठे आसानी से इंग्लिश बोलना सीख सकते हैं। Supernova के साथ अपनी झिझक दूर करें। आज ही Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड करें और कॉन्फिडेंस के साथ इंग्लिश बोलें! [So now without any expensive classes, you too can easily learn to speak English sitting at home. Overcome your hesitation with Supernova. Download the Supernova app today and speak English with confidence!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a direct Call to Action to the viewer.
- Summarizes the main benefit: learning from home without expensive classes.
- Ends on an empowering, confident note tied to the Supernova brand.
